label:
Eldamon 掷骰表
Eldamon Roll Tables

Table 2b: Finding an Eldamon in the Pres.name: 表2b：在元素存在时找到一只艾达蒙（标准） Table 2b: Finding an Eldamon in the Presence of an Element (Standard)

Table 8: Eldamon Personality Quirk.name: 表8：艾达蒙个性怪癖 Table 8: Eldamon Personality Quirk

Table 4: Eldamon Rarity.name: 表 4：Eldamon 稀有度 Table 4: Eldamon Rarity

Table 7: Eldamon Appearance Feature.name: 表格 7：艾达蒙外观特性 Table 7: Eldamon Appearance Feature

results.1-50: Standard Appearance The eldamon looks more or less like others of their kind.
results.51-52: Bigger The eldamon is noticeably bigger than others of their kind, though still the same size category.
results.53-54: Smaller The eldamon is noticeably smaller than others of their kind, though still the same size category.
results.55-56: Different Eye Color The eldamon’s eyes are a different color than other eldamon of their kind.
results.57-58: Heterochromia The eldamon’s eyes are different colors (or the same color if eldamon of their kind normally have different colors).
results.59-60: Different Body or Hair Color The eldamon’s body, hair, or both are a different color than other eldamon of their kind.
results.61-62: Half and Half Body Color The eldamon’s body, hair, or both are a different color than other eldamon of their kind on just one side, either their left side or right side.
results.63-64: Vibrant Coloration The eldamon’s coloration is more vibrant than other eldamon of their kind.
results.65-66: Soft Coloration The eldamon’s coloration is softer and more delicate than other eldamon of their kind.
results.67-68: Grayscale The eldamon’s coloration is all in grayscale, or if the eldamon’s kind normally are all in grayscale, the eldamon includes colors.
results.69-70: Shifting Colors The eldamon’s colors shifting and change over time.
results.71-72: Sparkly The eldamon sparkles in the light and looks especially shiny.
results.73-74: Cousin The eldamon looks like a related but different animal or object than others of their kind, such as a fox instead of a wolf or a silver dish instead of a hand mirror.
results.75-76: Elemental Gems Either the eldamon’s body has gems of congealed elemental energy in their body, or the elemental gems in their body are a different color or shape if others of their kind normally have elemental gems.
results.77-78: Elemental Lines Either the eldamon’s body has lines that circulate elemental energy across their body, or the elemental lines in their body are a different color or pattern if others of their kind normally have elemental lines.
results.79-80: Elemental Aura Either the eldamon exudes a visible aura of elemental energy, or the elemental aura around them is a different color or shape if others of their kind normally have an elemental aura.
results.81-82: Horns and Spines The eldamon has small horns, spines, or both on their body, though not large enough to cause damage.
results.83-84: Fearsome The eldamon’s pet form looks more like a smaller version of their battle form, rather than a cuter form.
results.85-86: Cute The eldamon’s battle and evolved form look more like bigger version of the eldamon’s pet form, with any adjustments needed to grant them their form and evolution abilities.
results.87-88: Shifting Form The eldamon’s form slightly shifts and transforms over time.
results.89-90: Translucent Body The eldamon’s body allows light to pass through, giving it a translucent appearance.
results.91-92: Wispy Body The eldamon’s body trails off into wisps at the bottom.
results.93-94: Fastidious The eldamon’s form looks tidy and meticulously well kept.
results.95-96: Wild The eldamon’s form looks disheveled and untamed.
results.97-98: Wholesome The eldamon’s form looks saintly and wholesome.
results.99-100: Baleful The eldamon’s form looks diabolical and baleful.

Table 9a: Check for Eldamon Secret.name: 表 9a：检定艾达蒙秘密 Table 9a: Check for Eldamon Secret

results.1-90: The eldamon doesn’t have a special secret.
results.91-99: The eldamon has a special secret. Roll on Table 9b to see what it is.
results.100-100: The eldamon has two secrets. Roll twice on Table 9b to determine them.

Table 6: Elemental Ability Variation.name: 表 6：元素能力变体 Table 6: Elemental Ability Variation

results.51-55: Alternate Starting Power The eldamon starts with one power that’s different than normal for an eldamon of their kind and level.
results.56-60: Alternate Power Set The eldamon starts with the power set from another random eldamon of their element.
results.61-65: Alternate Saving Throw The eldamon has a different random eldamon saving throw.
results.66-70: Alternate Skill The eldamon replaces one of its eldamon skills with a different random skill from this list: Acrobatics, Athletics, Intimidation, Performance, Stealth, Survival, or Thievery. An eldamon never replaces a skill they need for one of their abilities.
results.71-75: Alternate Elemental Ability The eldamon has the elemental ability normally associated with another random eldamon of their element. This doesn’t change their form or evolution abilities.
results.76-80: Glowing The eldamon glows with elemental energy like a torch (or doesn’t glow if they are a fire or light eldamon that normally glows).
results.81-85: Unusual Affinities Choose two random elements to which the eldamon isn’t normally weak or resistant using Table 3. The eldamon is resistant to the traits associated with one of those elements and weak to the traits associated with the other element. This can’t make the eldamon resistant or weak to physical damage.
results.86-90: Unusual Attacks One of the eldamon’s unarmed attacks that would normally deal bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage deals a different damage type from among those three options. If the eldamon has no unarmed attacks that deal any of these damage types, reroll on Table 6.
results.91-96: Tough or Nimble The eldamon switches their Dexterity and Constitution modifiers, both for the base and for the progression.
results.97-101: Strong, Smart, or Charming The eldamon switches any two of their Strength, Intelligence, and Charisma modifiers, both for the base and for the progression.

Table 1c: Finding an Eldamon in a Neutra.name: 表1c：在中立情境中发现一只艾达蒙（高） Table 1c: Finding an Eldamon in a Neutral Context (High)

Table 9b: Eldamon Secrets.name: 表9b：艾达蒙秘闻 Table 9b: Eldamon Secrets

results.1-3: The eldamon was once friends with another hero or adventurer, whether famous or not.
results.4-6: The eldamon was once friends with a villain, whether famous or not.
results.7-9: The eldamon once melded into a powerful artifact or other major magic item.
results.10-12: The eldamon once melded into an incredibly dangerous creature that matches their element.
results.13-15: The eldamon once melded into an elemental calamity, such as a tsunami or volcanic eruption.
results.16-18: The eldamon made a promise to their last friend to perform one last task, and they still have yet to complete it.
results.19-21: The eldamon has sworn to watch over the descendants of their old friend from long ago. Perhaps they need help keeping track of those descendants, or maybe their new friend is one of them.
results.22-24: The eldamon is searching for a lost item of great importance to them.
results.25-27: The eldamon is searching for an old friend, though with their sense of time, the friend might be long dead by now.
results.28-30: The eldamon is or was one of the elemental pillars for a powerful seal. What does the seal contain or hold back, and will the eldamon’s journey with their new friend help strengthen the seal or risk breaking it?
results.31-33: The eldamon once knew the location of a lost treasure or ruin. With the way their understanding of the mortal world works, can they still find it? Will they bring their new friend there?
results.34-36: The eldamon is famous among other eldamon for something they once did or a talent they possess.
results.37-39: The eldamon was once venerated as a god or protector by a community.
results.40-42: The eldamon was once an eldamon of another element but somehow shifted to their current element and form over time.
results.43-45: The eldamon lost all memory of an essential event in their life.
results.46-48: The eldamon somehow always seems to attract the attention and influence of an element different than their own.
results.49-51: The eldamon once lived in a far-off land
results.52-54: The eldamon has a particular snack or other guilty pleasure from the mortal world, and they’d love to have an eldamon trainer phase them in so they can indulge it.
results.55-57: On rare occasions and circumstances that can’t be intentionally triggered, the eldamon opens a miniature temporary portal to an associated plane.
results.58-60: The eldamon knows the deepest secret of an important figure, though given the way interact with the world and their memories, they likely have no idea the information is important.
results.61-63: The eldamon sneezes uncontrollably when it encounters one of the elements to which it’s weak, almost as if it was allergic.
results.64-66: The eldamon was once a creature other than an eldamon that was reborn or transformed into an eldamon by an extremely unusual circumstance.
results.67-69: The eldamon is secretly a spy, gathering information for another original mortal friend. The spy might come to care more deeply for their new mortal friend and refuse to report, and even if they don’t, due to an eldamon’s thought patterns and memory, the original mortal friend doesn’t expect much to come from their spy.
results.70-72: The eldamon is targeted by an evil organization trying to capture them for an unknown reason.
results.73-75: The eldamon is obsessed with a specific form of obscure lore and wants to engage with their obsession whenever possible.
results.76-78: The eldamon claims some worldly title in the mortal world with no real evidence, such as claiming to be the mayor of a far-off town whose name no one recognizes.
results.79-81: The eldamon is often tired, and when it enters a restful state, it usually accidently melds into a nearby object until it awakens. This can be a boon or bane depending on the eldamon and the object.
results.82-84: The eldamon hoards tokens related to their element, and hides them among their mortal friend’s belongings.
results.85-87: This eldamon came from the elemental energies of a different world or reality—not the same world as other eldamon and their mortal friend.
results.88-90: The eldamon secretly watched over their mortal friend when the friend was younger.
results.91-93: The eldamon is trying to win the affection of another eldamon, and they might bring their mortal friend in on the secret to ask for help.
results.94-96: The eldamon goes by a nickname and keeps their true name secret.
results.97-100: The eldamon has a secret personality quirk (roll again on Table 8) that they choose to hide. Your original roll on Table

Table 3b: Random Element (All 20).name: 表3b：随机元素（全部20项） Table 3b: Random Element (All 20)

Table 5: Eldamon Age and Background.name: 表5：艾达蒙年代与背景 Table 5: Eldamon Age and Background

results.1-10: Newborn The eldamon has only recently been born. They can’t speak or understand any language and know little of the world around them.
results.11-30: Young The eldamon is relatively young with little experience beyond their own element. They speak and understand only the language listed in their entry.
results.31-80: Typical The eldamon has lived in an area long enough to understand mortals and pick up the prevailing language (usually Common) in addition to their listed language.
results.81-90: Elemental Envoy The eldamon has lived among eldamon of another element and gets along with them well. Roll on Table
results.91-100: Ancient Slumberer The eldamon hasn’t been active since ancient times, and their understanding of the world is based on outdated information. They speak and understand one ancient, dead, or esoteric language, in addition to their listed language. If your world doesn’t have any such languages, use a language spoken by particularly long-lived ancestries, such as Draconic.
